title: Gary Erskine
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Gary Erskine''' is an artist who was one of the pencillers and inkers working on the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' series. He has also contributed to a number of other comics for [[Dark Horse Comics]], and provided cover art for all three issues of ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Leader]]''.<ref name="Dark Horse Comics Website">{{DarkHorse|url=search/search.php?frompage=userinput&sstring=Gary+Erskine&x=5&y=6|text=Dark Horse Comics > Search Results: Gary Erskine}}</ref><ref name="Omnibus 1">{{DarkHorse|url=profile/profile.php?sku=13-749|text=''Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #1''}}</ref>
